display.purpose: Hero statement only. One large, well-cut idea per view.

label.purpose: Uppercase buttons, eyebrows, metadata at tracking 0.16em.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and state transitions. Exponential ease-out, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The warm next step. Terracotta surface for the principal action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 85%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet alternative action on a warm sand surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--secondary-foreground); font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--secondary) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Frameless action on a hairline stroke; fills with a warm-stone wash on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 0.25s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Inquiry CTA
components.description: Signature call to action with directional arrow. The site's reason to exist; one per screen.
components.html: Arrange a Visit
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; height: 3rem; padding: 0 1.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-cta:hover { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); border-color: var(--primary); } .ds-cta-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-cta:hover .ds-cta-icon { transform: translate(2px, -2px); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-cta-icon, .ds-cta { transition: none; } .ds-cta:hover .ds-cta-icon { transform: none; } }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Top navigation link. Quiet uppercase label that resolves to full ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 70%, transparent); font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: var(--foreground); }

narrative.overview: This system feels like being shown around a beautiful home by someone who genuinely wants you to stay. It borrows the calm editorial warmth of Kinfolk and Cereal: generous whitespace, soft warm light, and type that reads like a printed page rather than an app screen. Color is restrained. Warm cream and sand neutrals carry nearly every surface, and a single terracotta voice appears only where the visitor is invited to act. It is built on shadcn (Tailwind v4, base-ui) with a taupe warm-neutral base; the semantic tokens are the contract.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream surfaces, one rare terracotta voice (restrained strategy)
Editorial whitespace and an unhurried reading rhythm
Spectral serif display paired with Albert Sans body
Sharp, frameless edges (zero radius) inherited from the current build
Photography and space carry the emotion, not borders or buttons

rules.name: The One Warm Voice Rule
rules.body: Exactly one accent color exists (terracotta), and it appears only where the visitor is invited to act: primary CTA, links, focus. Its rarity is what makes a call to action feel like an open door.

rules.name: The Neutral-Accent Rule
rules.body: shadcn's accent token is a warm-stone hover wash, not the brand color. Never repaint accent terracotta to add color; that breaks every menu and ghost-button hover state.

rules.name: The Printed-Page Rule
rules.body: Body type is set for sustained, comfortable reading: 17px, line-height 1.65, lines capped at 65-75ch. If it reads like dense app UI, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Tonal-Layer Rule
rules.body: Separate surfaces with warm tone steps (cream to paper to sand), not shadows. A shadow appears only as a genuine response to state.

rules.name: The Gentle Arrival Rule
rules.body: Elements ease in; they never bounce, snap, or slide aggressively. Motion is choreography, and must degrade to static for reduced-motion visitors.

dos: Do lead with warmth, photography, and space; let tonal cream/sand layers carry structure.
Do reserve terracotta (primary) for inquiry actions, links, and focus, on under 10% of any screen.
Do set body type at 17px with line-height 1.65 and 65-75ch line length for a broad, age-spanning audience.
Do keep a low-friction way to inquire within reach from anywhere on the page.
Do restyle by retuning the shadcn semantic tokens, and keep accent a neutral hover wash.
Do ease motion in gently on exponential curves and honor prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't look like generic SaaS / proptech: no gradient heroes, geometric-sans-on-gradient, friendly-app voice, or hero-metric templates.
Don't adopt listings-portal grammar: no filter rails, repeated card grids, price tags everywhere, or clutter.
Don't flex luxury: no gold-on-black, no oversized INVEST NOW CTAs, no gradient text, no opulent excess.
Don't go corporate sterile: no stock-photo handshakes, no navy-and-gray, no lifeless enterprise template feel.
Don't use pure #000 or #fff, side-stripe accent borders, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't repaint shadcn's accent token terracotta; it is the neutral hover wash, not the brand voice.
